title: corchorus sublatus
intro: Corchorus sublatus, also known as the Nigella corchorus or the jute plant, is a type of flowering plant in the mallow family Malvaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Corchorus sublatus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and lower blood sugar levels. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and its leaves and seeds can also be used in herbal preparations, such as capsules or tinctures.
